_contextSnippet: In contrast, in the cohorts treated with anti-Ly6G 1A8 antibody or HU, 11/15 or 9/12 mice respectively were cured of tumor, 2/15 or 1/12 were partial, and 2/15 or 2/12 died from immediate toxicities
details: Treatment with anti-Ly6G antibody resulted in 11/15 mice cured of tumor, 2/15 partial response, and 2/15 deaths from immediate toxicities
